name: 懸念預告鉤子
description: 女主出獄時直接宣告復仇意圖，讓觀眾帶著期待感繼續觀看，想看她如何一步步清算每個人。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: 3 years behind bars. My biological parents to save the housekeeper's daughter personally sent me to hell. Now I've served my sentence. Time for reckoning.
